text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You want me to do an interview?

Yes. According to Tazuna, the reporters are practically climbing over 
the gates for a chance to talk to you.

Yes. According to Tazuna, the reporters are practically climbing over 
the gates for a chance to talk to you.

They must be extra interested now that you're the favorite to win the 
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So it would seem…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Don't wanna do it? Then send me instead!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A simple "I'm currently abstaining from my beloved cakes for my diet." 
will convince them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait, did you see me pacing in front of that cake shop earlier?!
I don't remember mandating a diet… It must be self-imposed.
choice_data_list: A slice or two couldn't hurt, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, it's quite all right. If I give in to temptation once, who knows what 
other excuses I'll make?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I will go and speak to the reporters.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You're currently the favorite for the autumn Tenno Sho. How 
confident are you in your ability to take home the win?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very much so. However, one never knows what may happen during a 
race. I wish to approach the contest free from arrogance.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
There are some very notable competitors slated to run that day. What 
kind of strategy are you thinking of employing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, ah…

Mejiro McQueen glances my way, her expression seemingly asking if 
that is a topic she should broach.
I'm afraid that we can't share those details.

Let's just say that it would be great if we could get a starting position 
on the inside.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text: I've heard that at one point, your team consisted only of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's right, though we have managed to turn things around as of 
late.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Would it be accurate to chalk that up to your performance at the 
spring Tenno Sho?

McQueen looks my way again. I sense that she's struggling to come 
up with a good answer to that question.
choice_data_list: Yes, that is why we're here today.

text_block_list.text:
Even when the team was on the verge of disbandment, she pulled 
through and attracted new talent with her achievement.
McQueen's efforts have been a big inspiration for the others.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text: I see. We're expecting big things from you here on out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Yes! Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Lastly, do you have anything you'd like to say to your fans?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored that you would support me to the point where I am the 
favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll be devoting my all to my training in preparation for the race. I do 
not plan on letting you down.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sheesh, so serious! Couldn't shake up the typical interview a bit?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Again, that's because I am serious.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but all of your answers were sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I really can't wait for the race!

It's not just the fans who are expecting great things of Mejiro 
McQueen.

I can't think of anyone more deserving to stand at the center of a 
team.
All right, why don't we go get something tasty to charge us back up?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wooo, hella! I'm about to go to town on some all-you-can-eat lobster!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to try that place with the famous carrot sweets 
lately!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text:
Geez, this is a celebration for McQueen, so let's let her pick, all 
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um… I'm afraid I will have to refrain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I should really move on to my training for today. That interview took 
up a lot of precious time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, you're gonna go out for training now? You really good on 
keeping up this pace?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I won't push myself too hard. The last thing I need is a 
repeat of the time I fell ill.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I'm finally hitting my stride with my routine. I can't let this chance 
go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is it fine with you, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'll leave it up to you.
I'll leave it up to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Well then, I shall be off.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Super serious, that one.
At last, the day of the autumn Tenno Sho arrives.
Wow, those stands are absolutely packed.
Wow, those stands are absolutely packed.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Meaning that Golshi Yakisoba's on track for some record profits! I've 
got noods to fry!
What, and miss cheering for McQueen? Speaking of, where is she?
What, and miss cheering for McQueen? Speaking of, where is she?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: She's already on her way out there, yo.
Really? But there's still so much time left before the race starts…
Really? But there's still so much time left before the race starts…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have the dignity of the Mejiro name to bear… the hopes of countless 
fans on my shoulders…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My dear team members' expectations, and those of my trainer…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: For all of their sakes, I will achieve victory today.
